filter.name: activities_overdue
filter.help: Show all records which has next action date is before today

filter.name: not_invoiced
filter.help: Purchase orders that include lines not invoiced.

filter.name: invoiced
filter.help: Purchase orders that have been invoiced.

filter.name: activities_overdue
filter.help: Show all records which has next action date is before today

button.name: button_cancel
button.confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel the selected RFQs/Orders?

button.name: button_cancel
button.confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel the selected RFQs/Orders?

button.name: action_create_invoice
button.invisible: state not in ('purchase', 'done') or invoice_status in ('no', 'invoiced')

button.name: confirm_reminder_mail
button.invisible: state not in ('purchase', 'done') or mail_reminder_confirmed or not date_planned

button.name: action_create_invoice
button.invisible: state not in ('purchase', 'done') or invoice_status not in ('no', 'invoiced') or not order_line

button.name: action_bill_matching
button.invisible: not partner_id or state not in ('purchase', 'done') or not partner_bill_count or invoice_status == 'invoiced'

div.name: reminder
div.title: Automatically send a confirmation email to the vendor X days before the expected receipt date, asking him to confirm the exact date.

field.name: help
field.p: No request for quotation found. Let's create one!

Requests for quotation are documents that will be sent to your suppliers to request prices for different products you consider buying. Once an agreement has been found with the supplier, they will be confirmed and turned into purchase orders.

field.name: help
field.p: No purchase order found. Let's create one!
Once you ordered your products to your supplier, confirm your request for quotation and it will turn into a purchase order.

field.name: help
field.p: This vendor has no purchase order. Create a new RfQ
The request for quotation is the first step of the purchases flow. Once converted into a purchase order, you will be able to control the receipt of the products and the vendor bill.
